title: nasturtium humifusum
intro: Nasturtium humifusum, also known as earth-smelling cress, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial or annual herb with medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory problems, as well as to treat digestive issues such as diarrhea and nausea. Herbal preparations of Nasturtium humifusum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves, flowers, or roots of the plant.
